allow: Bash(ssh dd@pi-satellite "docker stop lva && docker rm lva && echo 'container removed'")

Bash(ssh dd@pi-satellite "echo '=== AUDIO DEVICES ===' && aplay -l && echo && echo '=== CAPTURE DEVICES ===' && arecord -l && echo && echo '=== SPI ===' && ls /dev/spi* 2>/dev/null || echo 'no spi devices' && echo && echo '=== I2S / SOUND MODULES ===' && lsmod | grep -E 'snd|i2s|voice'")
Bash(ssh dd@pi-satellite "arecord -D hw:0,0 -f S32_LE -r 16000 -c 2 -d 3 /tmp/test_mic.wav 2>&1 && echo 'capture ok' && ls -lh /tmp/test_mic.wav")
Bash(ssh dd@pi-satellite "sudo loginctl enable-linger dd && echo 'linger ok'")
Bash(ssh dd@pi-satellite "ls /run/user/1000/ 2>/dev/null; id dd; loginctl show-user dd 2>&1 | grep -i runtime")
Bash(ssh dd@pi-satellite "ls /run/user/1000/pulse/ 2>/dev/null; XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/run/user/1000 pactl info 2>&1 | grep -E 'Server|Default'")
Bash(ssh dd@pi-satellite "systemctl --user status pipewire pipewire-pulse 2>&1 | grep -E 'Active|●'")
Bash(ssh dd@pi-satellite "systemctl --user start pipewire-pulse && sleep 2 && PULSE_SERVER=unix:/run/user/1000/pulse/native XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/run/user/1000 pactl info 2>&1 | grep -E 'Server|Default'")
Bash(ssh dd@pi-satellite "PULSE_SERVER=unix:/run/user/1000/pulse/native XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/run/user/1000 pactl list sinks short; pactl list sources short 2>&1")
